/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/HeadFootball.dir/src/Main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HeadFootball.dir/src/GameObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HeadFootball.dir/src/Ball.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HeadFootball.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HeadFootball.dir/src/HumanPlayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HeadFootball.dir/src/AIPlayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HeadFootball.dir/src/Game.cpp.o -o HeadFootball  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-graphics.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-window.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-audio.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-system.3.0.2.dylib
